/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/ar qc libbookshelfparser.a CMakeFiles/bookshelfparser.dir/BookshelfDataBase.cc.o CMakeFiles/bookshelfparser.dir/BookshelfDriver.cc.o CMakeFiles/bookshelfparser.dir/BookshelfParser.cc.o CMakeFiles/bookshelfparser.dir/BookshelfScanner.cc.o
/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/ranlib libbookshelfparser.a
